blocks.text: was already watching the right person.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: How long have you all known each other?

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Ten years, give or take. First semester of college.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: Marcus decided we were all friends before any of us had agreed to it.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: Do you remember the lake house? Three summers ago?

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: You would have spun in circles the whole afternoon.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: You had the general concept of it.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: What are you two talking about?
Sophie reached for Dean's arm without looking. He shifted toward her the same way. The kind of movement you stop having to think about.
The fire was not getting low.

blocks.prompt: You saw something just now. What was it?

options.label: The way Nadia's expression shifted when Sophie reached for Dean.
The way Sophie glanced at Nadia after she turned away.
Nothing. It was just conversation by a fire.
